name: Synutra International, Inc.
description: Synutra International, Inc. is a leading manufacturer and distributor of dairy-based nutritional products, primarily serving the Chinese market. The company specializes in producing infant formula, nutritional supplements, and other food products for children, adults, and nursing mothers under the Synutra and Shengyuan brand names. Committed to high-quality standards, Synutra operates through various segments, including nutritional food and supplements, to support healthy growth and development. Although it maintains significant operations and production facilities in China, the company was incorporated in the United States and was historically listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange.
